queries.question: Provide me with the blues music and folk music sung by John Hurt.
queries.sql:
SELECT Songs.SongTitle 
FROM Songs JOIN Singers ON Songs.Singer_id = Singers.id
WHERE (Songs.Music = 'Blues Music' OR Songs.Music = 'Folk Music') AND Singers.singername = "John Hurt"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?songtitle WHERE {
  ?songs a :Song .
  ?singers a :Singer .
  ?songs p:hasSingers ?singers .
  ?songs p:SongTitle ?songtitle .
  ?songs p:Music ?music_w .
  ?songs p:Music ?music_w2 .
  ?singers p:SingerName ?singername_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?music_w) = "Blues Music" || STR(?music_w2) = "Folk Music")) && STR(?singername_w) = "John Hurt"))
}
